invariant: A program's objectives may ONLY target validity / robustness / coverage. Optimizing a result MAGNITUDE (effect size, novelty, significance, association, p-value, z-score) over a design space is automated garden-of-forking-paths and is REJECTED. Magnitude is a CONSTRAINT and a REPORTED quantity, never an optimization target.

weight_constraints.rationale: A negative weight would invert a 'maximize' objective (e.g. minimize coverage) while the result still reports the safe objective label — a real gaming path. A non-finite weight is undefined. Both are rejected.

forced_exploratory_conditions: a degenerate (near-delta) design prior with no pre-data prior_provenance attestation cannot license a confirmatory claim
a declared review constraint the rule engine does not know is fail-closed (cannot be guaranteed satisfied) -> exploratory
no candidate design family met the eligibility floors -> exploratory
enforcement_mechanisms: the NeuroObjectiveV1 enum has no magnitude member (a magnitude objective cannot even be named)

a field validator rejects any raw objective string containing a forbidden substring, with an explicit reason (checked BEFORE enum coercion, so a p-hacking objective cannot be smuggled past the typed enum)
the objective->score-dimension map never points at mean_efficiency or any magnitude quantity; mean_efficiency is used only as an eligibility FLOOR, never maximized
